    @allure.story("过滤条件查询，一个不选，显示正常")

    def test_changeI_select2(self, login_to_changeI):
        driver = login_to_changeI  # WebDriver 实例

        changeI.click_button('//p[text()="资源"]/ancestor::div[2]/div[3]//i')
